Perkins Diesel Engine Parts

Engine overhaul kits, rebuild kits, gasket sets, piston rings & more for Perkins diesel engines — 4.236, 1004, 1104C, 1106 series and beyond.

Showing 50 parts
Engine Overhaul Kits Diesel Gasket Sets Diesel Piston Rings Bearings + more

This catalog covers Perkins diesel engine parts for the full range of Perkins industrial and agricultural engines. The largest section is engine overhaul kits — complete rebuild sets covering pistons, rings, gaskets, and bearings for a complete engine strip-down — whether that's a 1106, 1104C, 4.236, or any other series in the catalog. Whether you're quoting a diesel engine rebuild or sourcing a single replacement component, use the engine finder below to filter by your exact model.

The catalog includes engine rebuild kits in standard and oversize specifications, upper and lower gasket sets, cylinder head gaskets, diesel piston rings, main bearings, and turbochargers. If you need a motor overhaul kit for a specific Perkins series — 4.236, 1004, 1104C, or 1106 — select your model above and the results will filter automatically. Diesel engine piston rings and gasket sets are also stocked individually for jobs that don't require a full engine overhaul kit.

Perkins Engine Parts: Overhaul Kits, Rebuild Kits & Diesel Engine Components

A diesel engine rebuild on a Perkins engine typically starts with identifying the bore condition. If the cylinders are worn within standard tolerance, a standard rebuild kit covers the job. If the block has been bored oversize, you'll need a matching oversize piston and ring set. Delta Diesel Parts carries both — all clearly labelled by specification. For Perkins engine repair shops handling multiple engine families, we also stock Deutz diesel engine parts alongside the full Perkins range.

The most ordered items in this catalog are engine overhaul kits — they bundle the pistons, rings, gaskets, and bearings needed for a complete strip-down into a single part number, cutting sourcing time significantly. Engine rebuild kits are available for every major Perkins series stocked here: 4.203, Perkins 4.236 parts (C4.236, G4.236, T4.236), 4.248, 6.354, 404, 1004, 1104C, 1106C, 1106D, and 1204E. Each one is listed with its part number and specifications — use the search bar or filters to find straight to the right kit for your block.

Beyond overhaul kits, this catalog includes individual diesel engine parts for targeted repairs: cylinder head gaskets, valve cover gaskets, upper and lower gasket sets, main bearing sets, diesel piston rings, and turbochargers. If you're sourcing Perkins spare parts for a machine that only needs one component replaced, those are stocked here too. All Perkins parts and diesel engine components ship from our US warehouse — free ground shipping on orders over $250, same-day dispatch before 2 PM EST.

Can't find the right part? Contact our experts →
